title: Famous Buildings
editorialSummary: Well-known buildings grouped by function. False trail: St Basil's is iconic like a palace but is a cathedral; Sydney Opera House performs opera but is architecturally identified as an opera house, not a concert hall. The Met Opera (Metropolitan Opera) is in New York, not to be confused with the Met Museum. Potala Palace in Lhasa was both a palace and a religious site — placed in Palaces as its primary civic function.
